_note: This file documents the scheduled tasks ViralEvo uses. Scheduling is configured through OpenClaw's cron system, not this file. See SKILL.md for setup instructions.

tasks.description: Fetch trend signals and generate daily report
tasks.schedule: Daily at your configured report time (set during onboarding)

tasks.description: Verify accuracy of predictions made 24h ago
Verify accuracy of predictions made 72h ago
Analyze weekly accuracy and update model weights
tasks.schedule: Every Monday at your configured report time
